author: Craig Clark
text: Phoned the shop asked if he could fix my phone. Took it down 15 mins later I was a happy customer! New screen on my iPhone. Very polite and welcoming. Thanks again.

author: Heather Legg
text: Took my dad's phone in that he'd locked himself out of
meta: helpful advice and support given and fixed in under 2 hours.

author: callum_XDCJT123
text: Goreat customer service and quick services.

author: tracey t
text: Fabulous service. My phone died beyond repair so I went to these guys and they sorted me out there and then
meta: setting up my new phone and giving me advice. They also repair laptops
column6: so I'll definitely be back if (when!) anything else goes wrong!

author: Mick Slater
text: The best phone shop in derby so helpful no sales talk would recommend to everyone
meta: forget the rest go to the best in spondon village
column5: only wish could give them 10 stars.
